notFound.intro: A problem has been detected and the page you requested could not be found. This page has been shut down to prevent damage to your browsing experience.
notFound.advice: If this is the first time you've seen this stop error screen, don't panic. The page may simply never have existed. If this screen appears again, follow these steps:
notFound.steps: Check that you typed the address correctly. Go back to the desktop and open a file that actually exists. Or just enjoy the view — everything here still works.
notFound.hint: Press a button above to continue _

shutdown.safe: It is now safe to close this tab.
shutdown.reboot: …or click anywhere to boot back up

profile.name: Volodymyr Bondarenko

about.title: Volodymyr Bondarenko
about.intro: I'm a software engineer based in Amsterdam, currently building large-scale fullstack features at Vesper. I care about clean, scalable code and products that feel good to use.

vesper.title: Vesper
vesper.stack: Vue 3, Tailwind, Reka UI, Pinia, TypeScript, PHP (Laravel), SQL, Meilisearch
vesper.intro: Building and maintaining large-scale fullstack features across a commodity-trading platform.
bullets: Developed and maintained large-scale fullstack features across the commodity trading platform using Vue 3, Tailwind, Reka UI, Pinia, TypeScript, PHP (Laravel), SQL and Meilisearch; implemented role-based access, REST API endpoints, database migrations, and complex business logic.
Configured and maintained CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, CircleCI) for build, lint, type-check, send Slack notifications, test, and Sentry release tracking.

Led end-to-end development of the Bring Your Own Data project, enabling enterprise clients to upload, manage, and visualize custom price series alongside Vesper market data; drove new client acquisition and adoption.

Built and maintained the Template Workspaces project (Laravel Nova, PHP, SQL), enabling the customer success team to provision pre-configured client environments in minutes—reducing onboarding setup time by 10x.

Designed and shipped the Smoke Tests automation system: on-demand staging environments seeded with production data, running Playwright E2E tests multiple times daily via CircleCI with Slack notifications on pass/fail.

Resolved critical performance bottlenecks in high-volume dropdowns (5,680+ series) and the main dashboard: implemented virtual scrolling, lazy loading, and SQL/API query optimizations, cutting request count from 9,940 to 5,223 in targeted flows and reducing dropdown open time to under 200 ms.
Actively contributed to the shared vesper-ui component library (Vue 3, Tailwind, Reka UI), handling its deployment pipeline and integration across the platform.
Co-authored a PHP unit-conversion library (open-sourced as vesper/unit-conversion), resolving long-standing silent conversion bugs and adopted platform-wide.

Collaborated with the AI team on integrating a chatbot into the platform — analyzed integration requirements, evaluated architectural approaches, and contributed to implementation decisions to ensure a seamless fit within the existing product.

Maintained broad test coverage using Playwright (E2E, component) and PHP (controller & repository tests); maintained technical documentation and contributed to sprint planning, quarterly goal-setting, and tech talks.

worth.title: Worth Internet Systems
worth.intro: Delivered client projects in cross-functional teams.
bullets: Worked across multiple client projects in cross-functional teams; participated in sprint planning, MVP workshops, and project closing meetings.
Built UI for a wind turbine simulation tool and a map-based event permit application using React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and ArcGIS — implementing custom map markers, layers, and form validations.
Developed a React-based event pass scanning app for on-site operations and integrated business logic into a company website using EditorX.

frozeneon.title: Frozeneon
frozeneon.intro: Shipped marketplace features and modernized a legacy front end.
bullets: Developed new marketplace features and enhanced existing functionality using Vue 2/3, Nuxt.js, Pinia, SCSS, and REST API integrations
Refactored legacy codebase to improve maintainability, performance, and scalability; implemented UI redesigns and optimized front-end architecture for faster load times.

quinta.title: QuintaGroup
quinta.intro: Built real-time collaboration UI for a large SaaS platform.
bullets: Developed core features of Sourcery Platform — a large-scale collaborative SaaS for the lighting industry — using Vue.js, TypeScript, GraphQL (Apollo), and SCSS.
Built complex UI components for real-time collaboration: spreadsheet-like schedule editor, product collections, and manufacturer portal.
Worked closely with designers on UI/UX improvements, maintaining visual consistency across multiple subsystems.

surelock.title: SureLock & Key
surelock.intro: Built internal tooling and company websites.
bullets: Built an internal CRM system for tracking and assigning tasks to the U.S.-based technicians, integrating Google Maps API and Apollo GraphQL with Vue.js and TypeScript.
Developed and maintained company websites using Nuxt.js, React, and SCSS; improved performance and SEO for faster load times.

freelance.heading: Freelance Front-End Developer · 2019 — 2020
bullets: Delivered client projects end-to-end based on requirements, using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Vue, and React.
Restructured and maintained existing pages, implementing fixes and UI improvements.

logos.heading: Logos IT Academy — Mentor, HTML/CSS/JS · Apr 2022
bullets: Prepared and delivered course material to a group of 60 students; reviewed homework assignments, provided individual support, and evaluated student progress.
